Title: WWBN AVideo has an incomplete fix for CVE-2026-33502: Command Injection
Description: The incomplete fix for AVideo's `test.php` adds `escapeshellarg` for wget but leaves the `file_get_contents` and `curl` code paths unsanitized, and the URL validation regex `/^http/` accepts strings like `httpevil.com`.
Solution: Unfortunately, there is no solution available yet.
